title: Belgie's Compatibility
description: a mod that adds Compatibility between all of the mods released by belgie and his team
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfada012deb398d4f70919b9ee7e812fd340aaf1.png)
**Welcome to the mod that adds Compat with every mod released by Belgie & his team!
With the first update to this mod we add features like, being able to trim titanium horse armor from Tricky Trials + when you have Mounts & Monsters installed, placeable cluckshroom eggs from Endless Spring when you have Mini Madness Installed!
We also added 27+ new laterns to make tricky trials + Titanium purple compat with all the new lanterns added in Age of Ores! 
This is only the start of the compat mod, if you have any feature suggestions or bugs make sure to report them, the best place is within the discord linked!
Check out everything new in the first update:**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PLaEFuIo8dU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
